---
title: "Publications"
description: "Data-driven publication list for articles, books, conference papers, and theses."
lang: en
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    title-block: false
---

::: {.page-hero}
::: {.page-hero__content}
<p class="page-hero__eyebrow">Publications</p>

# Publication Directory

<p class="page-hero__meta">Data-driven, filterable, and category-based publication page</p>
<p class="page-hero__lede">
  This page is generated from `data/pub-articles.json`, `data/pub-books.json`,
  `data/pub-conferences.json`, and `data/pub-theses.json`. To add a new item,
  you only need to update the relevant JSON file.
</p>
:::
:::

::: {.highlight-grid}
::: {.highlight-card}
<p class="card-title">Category-Based Structure</p>

Articles, books, conference papers, and theses are listed in separate sections,
creating a clearer scholarly catalogue than one long mixed list.
:::

::: {.highlight-card}
<p class="card-title">Future-Ready Model</p>

The current model can read Zotero JSON fields directly, making it easy to grow toward
selected publications, BibTeX conversion, or a more automated Zotero workflow.
:::
:::

::: {.publication-shell}
::: {.section-heading}
<p class="section-kicker">Filtering and Ordering</p>

## All Publications {#publication-directory-title}

<p class="section-lede">
  Records are grouped by category, sorted by year in reverse chronological order,
  and ready for a future distinction between selected and complete publications.
</p>
:::

<div class="publication-toolbar">
<form class="publication-filters" aria-label="Publication filters">
<div class="field-group"><label for="category-filter">Category</label><select id="category-filter" name="category"><option value="all">All categories</option><option value="article">Articles</option><option value="book">Books</option><option value="conference">Conference papers</option><option value="thesis">Theses</option></select></div>
<div class="field-group"><label for="year-filter">Year</label><select id="year-filter" name="year"><option value="all">All years</option></select></div>
</form>
<p id="publication-feedback" class="publication-summary" aria-live="polite"></p>
</div>

<div id="publications-directory"></div>
:::

::: {.section-card}
## Data Schema

Supported fields:

- `title`
- `authors` or Zotero `author`
- `year`
- `issued`
- `venue`
- `type`
- `doi` or Zotero `DOI`
- `url` or Zotero `URL`
- `pdf`
- `abstract` or Zotero `abstractNote`

Not every field is required for every record, but keeping `title`, `author/authors`,
`issued/year`, and `type` consistent helps maintain a professional and readable listing.

Featured publications for the home page are kept separately as an ID list in
`data/featured-publications.json`.
:::

<script type="application/json" data-publication-source="true">
{{< include ../data/pub-articles.json >}}
</script>
<script type="application/json" data-publication-source="true">
{{< include ../data/pub-books.json >}}
</script>
<script type="application/json" data-publication-source="true">
{{< include ../data/pub-conferences.json >}}
</script>
<script type="application/json" data-publication-source="true">
{{< include ../data/pub-theses.json >}}
</script>
<script type="application/json" data-featured-source="true">
{{< include ../data/featured-publications.json >}}
</script>
<script src="/assets/js/publications.js" defer></script>
